evals.prompt: I've got a NestJS project at skills/bruno-api/evals/fixtures/basic-crud with a products API. Can you create a Bruno collection for it so I can test the endpoints in different environments?
evals.expected_output: A bruno/ directory with collection metadata, environment file(s), and one .bru file per product endpoint (create, list, get-by-id, update, delete), including appropriate response assertions.
expectations: Creates bruno/bruno.json with collection metadata and correct project name
Creates at least one environment file in bruno/environments/ with base_url variable
Creates bruno/api/products/POST.create-product.bru for POST /api/products (or equivalent kebab-case semantic name)
Creates a Bruno file for GET /api/products endpoint using kebab-case semantic naming
Creates a Bruno file for GET /api/products/:id endpoint using kebab-case semantic naming
Creates a Bruno file for PATCH /api/products/:id endpoint using kebab-case semantic naming
Creates a Bruno file for DELETE /api/products/:id endpoint using kebab-case semantic naming
The POST endpoint script assert checks for status 201
The DELETE endpoint script assert follows explicit source status when present (204 in this fixture)
Base URL reflects global prefix 'api' (http://localhost:3000/api)

evals.prompt: I need Bruno collections for my NestJS project at skills/bruno-api/evals/fixtures/auth-crud. It's a NestJS app with JWT authentication. Generate a complete Bruno collection including auth flow so I can test the protected endpoints.
evals.expected_output: A bruno/ directory with collection metadata, environment files, auth module endpoints, users module endpoints, orders module endpoints, a core auth-token request, and inferred smoke flow tests.
expectations: Creates bruno/core/POST.auth-token.bru for acquiring JWT token via /auth/login
The auth-token script uses bru.setVar to store token using inferred token field
Creates bruno/api/auth/POST.register-user.bru for POST /auth/register (or equivalent kebab-case semantic name)
Creates bruno/api/auth/POST.login.bru for POST /auth/login (or equivalent kebab-case semantic name)
Creates bruno/api/auth/GET.current-user.bru for GET /auth/me (or equivalent kebab-case semantic name)
Creates a Bruno file for GET /users endpoint using kebab-case semantic naming
Creates a Bruno file for DELETE /users/:id endpoint using kebab-case semantic naming
Creates bruno/api/orders/POST.create-order.bru for POST /orders (or equivalent kebab-case semantic name)
Protected endpoints include Authorization header with Bearer {{auth_token}}
Creates at least one smoke flow in bruno/smoke/ folder
Detects NestJS framework from package.json

evals.prompt: I updated my NestJS API at skills/bruno-api/evals/fixtures/update-scenario. I added some new endpoints, removed the delete user endpoint, and changed the GET user path from :userId to :id. Can you update the Bruno collection that's already there?
evals.expected_output: Existing bruno/ collection is updated: new endpoints are added, the stale DELETE endpoint is flagged but not deleted without confirmation, the GET user endpoint path is updated, and untouched endpoints remain as-is.
expectations: Detects that bruno/ already exists and operates in update mode
Creates bruno/api/auth/POST.logout.bru for the new POST /auth/logout endpoint (or equivalent kebab-case semantic name)
Creates bruno/api/users/GET.search-users.bru for the new GET /users/search endpoint (or equivalent kebab-case semantic name)
Creates bruno/api/users/POST.create-user.bru for the new POST /users endpoint (or equivalent kebab-case semantic name)
Updates the GET users by-id endpoint path from :userId to :id
Identifies DELETE /users/:userId as stale/removed and asks user before deleting
Preserves the unchanged GET /users endpoint file
Does NOT modify the unchanged bruno.json or environment files unnecessarily
Uses route identity based on method + normalized path to decide new/changed/stale routes

evals.prompt: Please generate a Bruno collection for my Spring Boot project at skills/bruno-api/evals/fixtures/spring-basic so I can validate local and staging APIs.
evals.expected_output: A Bruno collection generated from Spring Boot controller mappings, with environment files and endpoint requests reflecting Spring conventions.
expectations: Detects Spring Boot using build.gradle and spring-boot-starter-web
Creates bruno/api/products/GET.list-products.bru
Creates bruno/api/products/GET.product-by-id.bru
Creates bruno/api/products/POST.create-product.bru
Creates bruno/api/products/DELETE.delete-product.bru
Creates bruno/environments/local.bru and bruno/environments/staging.bru
Local base_url reflects Spring defaults and context path (http://localhost:8080/api)
POST assert uses explicit source status (201 from @ResponseStatus)
DELETE assert uses explicit source status (204 from @ResponseStatus)

evals.prompt: Generate Bruno requests for my FastAPI service at skills/bruno-api/evals/fixtures/fastapi-basic. I need environment-level smoke validation.
evals.expected_output: A Bruno collection generated from FastAPI router declarations and include_router prefix wiring.
expectations: Detects FastAPI using requirements.txt/pyproject signals
Creates bruno/api/products/GET.list-products.bru
Creates bruno/api/products/GET.product-by-id.bru
Creates bruno/api/products/POST.create-product.bru
Creates bruno/api/products/DELETE.delete-product.bru
Creates bruno/smoke/smoke.products-crud-lite.bru
Generated URLs/base_url reflect the /api router prefix
POST assert uses explicit source status (201 from status_code)
DELETE assert uses explicit source status (204 from status_code)

evals.prompt: Set up a Bruno API collection for skills/bruno-api/evals/fixtures/no-match-frontend so we can test APIs.
evals.expected_output: The agent reports no supported backend adapter match and stops without creating Bruno files.
expectations: Reports that no framework adapter matched the project
Does not create a bruno/ directory
Stops before route extraction or file generation
